returns.estimatedVoterFatigue: Estimated voter fatigue impact in basis points
returns.percentMalicious: Percentage of proposals that were malicious
returns.totalProposals: Total number of spam proposals created

params.spamCount: Number of spam proposals to create first

params.numberOfSpamProposals: How many spam proposals to create

returns._0: Number of successfully created spam proposals
proposalId The ID of the created malicious proposal
success Whether the vote was cast

_doNothing().notice: No-op function for spam proposals to call

analyzeAttackEffectiveness().notice: Analyze the effectiveness of the spam attack

executeSpamAndMaliciousAttack(uint256,ad.notice: Create spam + malicious proposal combined attack Creates N spam proposals, then creates malicious proposal hidden among them

executeSpamAttack(uint256).notice: Creates spam proposals to bury legitimate governance

getCostPerSpamProposal().notice: Get cost per spam proposal (should be very low if VULN-4 exists)

getSpamProposalInfo(uint256).notice: Get info about a spam proposal

hideMaliciousProposalInSpam(address[],ui.notice: Hide a malicious proposal among spam proposals

voteForMaliciousProposal().notice: Try to pass the malicious proposal by voting on it This simulates attack succeeding if: - Voter turnout is low (spam caused fatigue) - Proposal is hard to see (buried in spam) - Quorum is low (VULN-5)
